---
title: Installation
description: Install @justwant/cache and an adapter for your runtime.
icon: Download
---

## Step 1: Install the core and an adapter

Install `@justwant/cache` along with the adapter for your storage backend. For development, start with the in-memory adapter.

<CodeBlockTabs defaultValue="memory">
  <CodeBlockTabsList>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="memory">Memory (dev)</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="redis">Redis</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="upstash">Upstash</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="cf-kv">Cloudflare KV</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="vercel-kv">Vercel KV</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
  </CodeBlockTabsList>
  <CodeBlockTab value="memory">

<CodeBlockTabs defaultValue="bun">
  <CodeBlockTabsList>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="bun">Bun</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="npm">npm</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="pnpm">pnpm</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="yarn">Yarn</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
  </CodeBlockTabsList>
  <CodeBlockTab value="bun">

```bash
bun add @justwant/cache
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
  <CodeBlockTab value="npm">

```bash
npm install @justwant/cache
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
  <CodeBlockTab value="pnpm">

```bash
pnpm add @justwant/cache
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
  <CodeBlockTab value="yarn">

```bash
yarn add @justwant/cache
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
</CodeBlockTabs>

  </CodeBlockTab>
  <CodeBlockTab value="redis">

<CodeBlockTabs defaultValue="bun">
  <CodeBlockTabsList>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="bun">Bun</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>

  <CodeBlockTab value="bun">


  </CodeBlockTab>

## Step 2: Create the cache

Create a shared cache instance in a module (e.g. `lib/cache.ts`).

<CodeBlockTabs defaultValue="memory">
  <CodeBlockTabsList>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="memory">Memory</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="redis">Redis</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="upstash">Upstash</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="cf-kv">Cloudflare KV</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
    <CodeBlockTabsTrigger value="vercel-kv">Vercel KV</CodeBlockTabsTrigger>
  </CodeBlockTabsList>
  <CodeBlockTab value="memory">

```ts title="lib/cache.ts"
import { createCache } from "@justwant/cache";
import { createMemoryAdapter } from "@justwant/cache/adapters/memory";

export const cache = createCache({
  adapter: createMemoryAdapter(),
});
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
  <CodeBlockTab value="redis">

```ts title="lib/cache.ts"
import { createCache } from "@justwant/cache";
import { createRedisAdapter } from "@justwant/cache/adapters/redis";
import Redis from "ioredis";

const redis = new Redis(process.env.REDIS_URL!);

export const cache = createCache({
  adapter: createRedisAdapter({ client: redis }),
});
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
  <CodeBlockTab value="upstash">

```ts title="lib/cache.ts"
import { createCache } from "@justwant/cache";
import { createUpstashAdapter } from "@justwant/cache/adapters/upstash";
import { Redis } from "@upstash/redis";

const redis = new Redis({
  url: process.env.UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL!,
  token: process.env.UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN!,
});

export const cache = createCache({
  adapter: createUpstashAdapter({ client: redis }),
});
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
  <CodeBlockTab value="cf-kv">

```ts title="lib/cache.ts"
import { createCache } from "@justwant/cache";
import { createCfKvAdapter } from "@justwant/cache/adapters/cf-kv";

// In a Cloudflare Worker — KV_NAMESPACE is bound in wrangler.toml
export function createWorkerCache(env: Env) {
  return createCache({
    adapter: createCfKvAdapter({ namespace: env.KV_NAMESPACE }),
  });
}
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
  <CodeBlockTab value="vercel-kv">

```ts title="lib/cache.ts"
import { createCache } from "@justwant/cache";
import { createVercelKvAdapter } from "@justwant/cache/adapters/vercel-kv";
import { kv } from "@vercel/kv";

export const cache = createCache({
  adapter: createVercelKvAdapter({ client: kv }),
});
```

  </CodeBlockTab>
</CodeBlockTabs>
